---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Why does it matter for ATLAS users?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature as clearly as possible. Include UI sketches, API shapes, or pseudocode if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you think about? Why is your proposal better?

## Which part of ATLAS does this affect?
- [ ] Chat interface
- [ ] Document indexing pipeline
- [ ] Pipeline simulator
- [ ] Knowledge graph view
- [ ] Vector retrieval
- [ ] Graph retrieval
- [ ] Observability / event streaming
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Additional Context
Links, references, or anything else that would help evaluate this proposal.
